message:
chore: close bd-3v9s (bd→br migration complete)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

 {"id":"bd-3s4c","title":"Optimize buildQuickWins allocations (one lever)","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-21T17:29:07.684700968Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-21T17:56:07.643534633Z","closed_at":"2026-01-21T17:56:07.643482755Z","close_reason":"wont_fix","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-3s4c","depends_on_id":"bd-1tgr","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-21T17:29:11.738379306Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-3s4c","depends_on_id":"bd-3c0m","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-21T17:29:11.552516856Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}],"comments":[{"id":61,"issue_id":"bd-3s4c","author":"Dicklesworthstone","text":"Profiling (bd-1tgr) showed buildQuickWins is NOT a hotspot - cumulative time <40ms on 696 issues. No optimization needed. Closing as won't_fix.","created_at":"2026-01-21T17:56:00Z"}]}
-{"id":"bd-3v9s","title":"Replace hardcoded bd references with br throughout","description":"bv still emits hardcoded bd (old Go binary) commands in robot output, triage recommendations, markdown exports, and emit-script mode. All should use br (beads_rust). This is a bug since bd is deprecated.

ALL AFFECTED LOCATIONS (17 sites across 4 files):

cmd/bv/main.go:
- Line 2779: robot-next ClaimCmd (bd update %s --status=in_progress)
- Line 2780: robot-next ShowCmd (bd show %s)
- Line 2997: emit-script claim comment
- Line 2999: emit-script show command
- Line 3007: emit-script quick actions (top pick)
- Line 3012: emit-script quick actions (all items)

pkg/analysis/triage.go:
- Line 964: buildCommands() listReady (bd ready)
- Line 965: buildCommands() listBlocked (bd blocked)
- Line 970: buildCommands() claimTop (bd update --status in_progress) [note: missing = sign]
- Line 971: buildCommands() showTop (bd show)
- Line 1571: TrackRecommendationGroup ClaimCommand (CI=1 bd update --status in_progress --json)
- Line 1631: LabelRecommendationGroup ClaimCommand

pkg/export/markdown.go:
- Line 390: bd show bulk command
- Line 396: bd update bulk command
- Lines 422,428,436: bd update/show per-issue
- Line 439: bd show final

pkg/analysis/label_suggest.go:
- Line 242: bd update --add-label suggestion

Implementation:

1. Create pkg/analysis/cli_detect.go:
   - BeadsCLI() string: auto-detect br vs bd on PATH via exec.LookPath(); prefer br; error if neither found
   - ClaimCommand(id string) string: returns "br update ID --claim" (atomic) when br, or "bd update ID --status=in_progress" when bd
   - ShowCommand(id string) string: returns "br show ID" or "bd show ID"
   - ListReady() string: returns "br ready" or "bd ready"
   - ListBlocked() string: returns "br blocked" or "bd blocked"
   - LabelCommand(id, label string) string: for add-label operations
   - Cache detection result in package-level var (detect once, use many times)

2. Replace all 17 hardcoded bd references with dynamic calls to cli_detect functions
3. Unify command format: all robot/CI commands use "CI=1 br update ID --claim --json" pattern
4. Shell-escape IDs in emit-script output (use existing shellEscape helper where present)
5. Update existing tests to validate both br and bd command formats

EDGE CASES:
- Neither br nor bd on PATH: BeadsCLI() returns "br" with warning log (reasonable default since br is current)
- Old br version without --claim flag: ClaimCommand falls back to "br update ID --status=in_progress --actor $USER"
- IDs containing shell special chars: escape with single quotes in emit-script mode
- Windows paths in emit-script: use forward slashes (br handles both)
- Empty recommendations: quick actions section still generates valid (but empty) script

TESTS (28+ required):

Unit Tests (pkg/analysis/cli_detect_test.go):
- test_beads_cli_prefers_br: when both br and bd on PATH, returns "br"
- test_beads_cli_fallback_bd: when only bd on PATH, returns "bd"
- test_beads_cli_neither: when neither on PATH, returns "br" (default)
- test_claim_command_br: format is "br update ID --claim"
- test_claim_command_bd: format is "bd update ID --status=in_progress"
- test_show_command_format: both br and bd variants correct
- test_list_ready_format: both br and bd variants
- test_list_blocked_format: both br and bd variants
- test_label_command_format: both br and bd variants
- test_shell_escape_ids: IDs with spaces, quotes, slashes escaped properly
- test_detection_cached: BeadsCLI() called 100x returns same result without 100 exec.LookPath calls

Integration Tests (existing test files updated):
- test_robot_next_uses_br: --robot-next JSON contains "br" not "bd"
- test_robot_triage_uses_br: --robot-triage commands use "br"
- test_emit_script_uses_br: --emit-script bash output uses "br"
- test_emit_script_claim_all_loop: "claim all" loop uses correct br format
- test_markdown_export_uses_br: markdown export commands use "br"
- test_track_recommendation_claim: TrackRecommendationGroup.ClaimCommand uses "br update --claim"
- test_label_recommendation_claim: LabelRecommendationGroup.ClaimCommand uses "br update --claim"
- test_label_suggest_uses_br: label suggestion actions use "br"

E2E Tests:
- test_robot_next_output_contract: full --robot-next output validates against JSON schema with br commands
- test_emit_script_executable: emitted bash script is valid bash (shellcheck passes)
- test_markdown_export_valid: exported markdown has correct br commands

Regression:
- All existing emit_script_test.go tests updated to accept br instead of bd
- All existing robot_contract_test.go tests updated (lines 473-476)

GitHub issue: beads_viewer PR #100 (closed, reimplemented independently)","status":"in_progress","priority":1,"issue_type":"bug","created_at":"2026-02-07T03:08:09.417151886Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-09T18:12:10.961063415Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-3v9s","depends_on_id":"bd-x1tm","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-07T21:10:09.057268834Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}],"comments":[{"id":66,"issue_id":"bd-3v9s","author":"Dicklesworthstone","text":"COORDINATION NOTE: This bead touches the same robot output paths as bd-x1tm (Normalize robot output envelope + _meta, P2, in-progress). When implementing:
1. Check bd-x1tm status first — if merged, robot-next/triage output format may have changed
2. The ClaimCmd/ShowCmd fields in robot-next JSON are affected by BOTH beads
3. If bd-x1tm adds _meta envelope wrapper, cli_detect functions should generate commands inside the new envelope format
4. Coordinate: implement bd-3v9s AFTER bd-x1tm lands to avoid merge conflicts in cmd/bv/main.go lines 2779-3012

ADDITIONAL TEST LOGGING REQUIREMENTS:
All test assertions should include descriptive failure messages, e.g.:
  assert.Contains(t, output, "br update", "robot-next ClaimCmd should use br, not bd")
  assert.NotContains(t, output, "bd ", "no hardcoded bd commands should remain in output")

E2E test scripts should log:
  - Which binary was detected (br vs bd) and full path
  - Each replacement site verified (file:line)
  - Before/after command format for each site
  - Pass/fail summary with count: 'Verified 17/17 sites migrated from bd to br'","created_at":"2026-02-07T21:10:04Z"}]}
